div.div:
5 · Service implementation
Default: WebMediaPlayerService
platform/media-player/web/media-player.web.ts
Override: options.createMediaPlayerService (deployment)

7 · Feature code (platform-agnostic)
inject(MediaPlayerKey) — e.g. App.vue, AudioPlayer.vue
No Capacitor imports in feature UI

div.div:
app/src/
plugins/
platform-services.plugin.ts ← app.use() entry; calls install*
examplePlugin.ts ← optional VITE_PLUGINS loader
platform/
core/
runtime.ts ← getRuntimeInfo() (globalThis.Capacitor)
media-player/ ← one folder per capability
contract.ts token.ts install.ts index.ts
web/
media-player.web.ts ← browser implementation
# future: platform/downloads/ … same shape
luminary-deployment/luminary-plugins/ — native factories; app.use(..., options)

div.div:
Pass factories when mounting the app, e.g.
app.use(platformServicesPlugin, { createMediaPlayerService: … })
Implementation may import @capacitor/* · luminary stays free of @capacitor/core

switch.text: Pass factories when mounting the app, e.g....

div.div:
1. platform//contract.ts · 2. token.ts · 3. web/*.ts · 4. install.ts (+ index.ts barrel)
5. Call install from platform-services.plugin.ts · 6. inject(Key) in UI
7. (Native) same contract in luminary-plugins; wire via app.use options
No adapters/capacitor/ inside luminary — native coupling in deployment.

switch.text: 1. platform//contract.ts · 2. token.ts · 3. web/*.ts · 4. install.ts (+ index.ts barrel)...

div.div:
Legend
Blue: bootstrap / consumers · Green: plugin & provide · Yellow: runtime · Red/pink: installer · Violet: implementation · Dashed: deployment override
Open in diagrams.net / draw.io. Narrative: README.md in this folder.
